calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Continued To Jan-12-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 1/12/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-01-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Linda Chan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CACH, LLC.
Defendant David Medina was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 19, 2009.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. Chan. Pursuant to the terms of said agreement, within thiry days of today's date, defendant David Medina shall pay plaintiff CACH, LLC the sum of $2,500.00. This amount shall be delivered directly to the office of counsel for plaintiff. In return, plaintiff shall dismiss this matter with prejudice.

If defendant David Medina fails not comply with the terms of this agreemt, plaintiff CACH, LLC may, upon ex parte application with twenty-four hours notice to defendant, obtain judgment for entire outstanding balance of $5,937.86, plus accrued interest to date.

Defendant was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of this agreement. This agreement will not be reduced to writing.

Matter is continued to October 1, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
